story: Every Sunday, Sarah pries her grandfather from his tinkering for lemonade stories. This time he tells a love tale: two who met online, met in Paris; he bought her a small silver heart cradling a fleur-de-lis. After travels, he secretly rented an apartment, had her design it, then revealed it was theirs. As Grandpa reaches for the pitcher, Grandma walks in and swats his hand: “Use a glass.”
implausible_knowledge: a small silver heart cradling a fleur-de-lis
question: When Grandma comes in and scolds Grandpa to use a glass, what will Sarah say?
answer_with_knowledge: Point to Grandma’s pendant and blurt that the story is about Grandma and Grandpa.
answer_without_knowledge: Tell Grandma they were hearing a love story.
